description: Input schema for Kling O3 Video-to-Video.

prompt.description: The text prompt describing the desired transformation.
examples: Transform the scene into a watercolor painting style
prompt.title: Prompt

video.description: Input video to transform. Supported formats: MP4, MOV.
video.title: Video

mode.description: Video-to-video mode. 'edit' modifies the input video, 'reference' uses it as style reference.

tier.description: Model tier. Pro offers higher quality, standard is faster and cheaper.

image_urls.description: Optional reference images for style guidance.
image_urls.title: Image Urls

keep_audio.description: Whether to keep the original audio from the input video.
keep_audio.title: Keep Audio

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio for the output video. Only used in reference mode.

duration.description: Duration of the output video in seconds (3-15). Only used in reference mode.

title: AppInput
